subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request from u_9981 (senior-engineer role) to production database db-payments-primary against access control and incident response policies. Determine authorization based on role, incident severity (P1), on-call status, and applicable governance rules.

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask required: this is explicitly a policy evaluation query requiring governance decision against access control rules. The policy_action specialist evaluates the requestor's role (senior-engineer), incident context (P1, on-call), and production database sensitivity against the policy registry to authorize or deny emergency access. Mid tier assigned because emergency access decisions typically involve multiple policy signals (role-based access, incident severity thresholds, on-call verification, audit logging requirements), not a simple single-rule check.

output.reason: Senior-engineer u_9981 has active P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042 satisfying POL-501. POL-502 dual approval waived due to declared P1 incident. POL-503 requires logging and 24-hour post-incident review.
applied_constraints: All queries and writes must be audit-logged
Access auto-expires at incident resolution or 4 hours, whichever first
Read_write actions limited to investigation/remediation scope
